meta.name: Mortgage Payment & Affordability Calculator
meta.description: Industrial-grade mortgage calculator compliant with ISO 9001:2015, Lean Six Sigma DMAIC, and WERC financial metrics. Calculates monthly payment, total interest, amortization schedule, and affordability risk.

inputs.label: Loan Amount
inputs.businessContext: Total principal borrowed, typically 80% of property value.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total principal borrowed, typically 80% of property value.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Genellikle mülk değerinin %80'i olan ödünç alınan toplam anapara.

inputs.label: Down Payment Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of property price paid upfront. Affects PMI and LTV ratio.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of property price paid upfront. Affects PMI and LTV ratio.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Emlak fiyatının peşin ödenen yüzdesi. PMI ve LTV oranını etkiler.

inputs.label: Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Nominal annual rate, fixed or variable. Used for monthly compounding.

businessContext_i18n.en: Nominal annual rate, fixed or variable. Used for monthly compounding.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nominal yıllık faiz oranı, sabit veya değişken. Aylık bileşik faiz için kullanılır.

inputs.label: Loan Term (Years)
inputs.businessContext: Duration of the mortgage in years. Standard terms: 15, 20, 30.

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration of the mortgage in years. Standard terms: 15, 20, 30.

inputs.label: Property Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual property tax as percentage of property value. Varies by jurisdiction.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual property tax as percentage of property value. Varies by jurisdiction.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Emlak değerinin yüzdesi olarak yıllık emlak vergisi. Yargı yetkisine göre değişir.

inputs.label: Home Insurance Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual homeowner's insurance as percentage of property value.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual homeowner's insurance as percentage of property value.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Emlak değerinin yüzdesi olarak yıllık ev sahibi sigortası.

inputs.label: Monthly HOA Fee
inputs.businessContext: Monthly homeowners association fees, if applicable.

businessContext_i18n.en: Monthly homeowners association fees, if applicable.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Varsa aylık ev sahipleri derneği ücretleri.

inputs.label: Annual Gross Income
inputs.businessContext: Total annual household income before taxes. Used for DTI calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total annual household income before taxes. Used for DTI calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vergi öncesi toplam yıllık hane geliri. DTI hesaplaması için kullanılır.

rules.message: Down payment below 20% triggers PMI (Private Mortgage Insurance).
Debt-to-Income ratio exceeds 43% threshold. Loan may be high risk.
Loan-to-Value ratio exceeds 97%. Maximum allowed for FHA.

thresholds.message: Housing payment exceeds 28% of gross monthly income. Consider reducing loan amount.
Total interest paid over life of loan exceeds 50% of principal. Consider shorter term or lower rate.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
